---
title: "Professional Summary"
title-block: false
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    smooth-scroll: true
    code-copy: true
---

## Download My Resume
[Bowen de Gouw - Resume (PDF)](documents/BowendeGouwResume.pdf){target="_blank"}


## BELOW IS A DEMO OF WHAT I AM PLANNING TO BUILD

## 💼 Professional Experience

### Consulting Intern — *Recombinators, Inc. 5000 Company*  
**Remote / Austin, TX | June – August 2024**  
- Spearheaded development of a business model for a medical clinic start-up in an emerging health sector.  
- Led six initiatives: stakeholder bios, market research, tech/vendor vetting, financial model updates, and SWOT-based location analysis.  
- Designed executive slide decks and presented weekly to C-suite stakeholders.  
- Owned dedicated workstreams, ensuring project alignment and on-time delivery.  

### Business Development Intern — *Bayleys Realty Group (Auckland, New Zealand)*  
**June – August 2022**  
- Partnered with Data Insights team to produce Bayleys’ 2022 **Co-Working+ Space Report**.  
- Transitioned lease data for 200+ commercial properties during major client onboarding.  
- Conducted nationwide data analysis for commercial and residential portfolios.  

---

## 🎓 Academic Projects

### Associate Consultant (SI360 Team) — *FlyWire*  
**Boston, MA | Jan – May 2024**  
- Consulted for a global fintech company specializing in international student payments.  
- Delivered insights on competitive positioning in China through research and interviews.  
- Presented findings directly to the **SVP of Strategy & Corporate Development**.  

### Cross-Functional Core — *Questrom School of Business*  
**Boston, MA | Aug – Dec 2023**  
- Collaborated with a nine-person team to develop a go-to-market strategy for a sports start-up.  
- Supervised analytics and operations: market sizing, supply chain design, and risk modeling.  
- Delivered weekly presentations and refined final investor pitch through iterative feedback.  

---

## 🧰 Skills & Tools
**Technical:** Python • SQL • R (RStudio) • Power BI • Excel • Google Analytics  

---

<div style="text-align: center; font-style: italic; margin-top: 40px;">
  <strong>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/bowen-de-gouw" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a> ·
    <a href="https://github.com/bdegouw" target="_blank">GitHub</a> ·
    <a href="mailto:bdegouw@bu.edu">Email</a>
  </strong>
</div>
